h1: Best Dynamic Programming Questions for Uber
intro: A curated set of 3 Dynamic Programming problems frequently useful for Uber interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Dynamic Programming problems should I do for Uber?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 3 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Dynamic Programming topic page and related roadmaps.
